consent_granted.description: Indicates whether the user granted the requested scopes.

scopes.description: An array of scopes requested by the client.

client_id.description: The ID of the Connected App client.

redirect_uri.description: The callback URI used to redirect the user after authentication. This is the same URI provided at the start of the OAuth flow.  This field is required when using the `authorization_code` grant.

response_type.description: The OAuth 2.0 response type. For authorization code flows this value is `code`.

organization_id.description: Globally unique UUID that identifies a specific Organization. The `organization_id` is critical to perform operations on an Organization, so be sure to preserve this value. You may also use the organization_slug or organization_external_id here as a convenience.

member_id.description: Globally unique UUID that identifies a specific Member. The `member_id` is critical to perform operations on a Member, so be sure to preserve this value. You may use an external_id here if one is set for the member.

session_token.description: A secret token for a given Stytch Session.

session_jwt.description: The JSON Web Token (JWT) for a given Stytch Session.

prompt.description: Space separated list that specifies how the Authorization Server should prompt the user for reauthentication and consent. Only `consent` is supported today.

state.description: An opaque value used to maintain state between the request and callback.

nonce.description: A string used to associate a client session with an ID token to mitigate replay attacks.

code_challenge.description: A base64url encoded challenge derived from the code verifier for PKCE flows.
